User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Important pages ko allow rehne do
Allow: /wp-content/uploads/
Allow: /wp-admin/admin-ajax.php

# Unnecessary ya sensitive areas block karo
Disallow: /wp-admin/
Disallow: /wp-includes/
Disallow: /cgi-bin/
Disallow: /readme.html

# Search & filter URLs block (duplicate content avoid)
Disallow: /*?s=
Disallow: /*?filter=
Disallow: /*?orderby=

# Sitemap add karo (VERY IMPORTANT)
Sitemap: https://thehouseofaradhya.com/sitemap.xml
